events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate LOTO sequence violation: lock without tag / tag without lock. Observed field condition. Work in progress. Need decide fail, risk high/critical? Need component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Need actions: stop work, apply both lock and tag per LOTO, verify zero energy state, etc. Need order? The task asks check order of work and catch sequence violation. We can provide order of proper LOTO steps maybe. Since not audio/video, sound_source, event_time, rate can be empty/0. Workable empty. Percent complete maybe 30. Value 0. Confidence 1.0. Rationale. References OSHA 1910.147(c)(2) etc. Need ensure JSON valid.

    "notify-affected-employees",
    "shut-down-equipment",
    "isolate-energy-sources",

    "apply-tagout-devices",
    "verify-zero-energy-state",
    "perform-service-work",
    "remove-lockout-tagout",
    "return-equipment-to-service"

  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Lockout device present without tag or tag present without lock",
    "LOTO device set is incomplete and does not meet OSHA 1910.147 requirements",
    "Cannot verify authorized employee identity, date, or reason for isolation",
    "Stored/residual energy may not be verified as zero before work proceeds"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately and secure the area",
    "Remove incomplete or incorrect LOTO devices and re-isolate all energy sources",
    "Apply a lock and a tag together to each energy-isolating device by the authorized employee",
    "Verify zero energy state and test for stored/residual energy before resuming work",
    "Complete required LOTO documentation and notify affected employees"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1910.147 requires lockout and tagout to be applied together so the device is both physically secured and clearly labeled. A lock without a tag or a tag without a lock fails to provide full protection and creates a high risk of unexpected energization. Work cannot continue until both are properly applied and zero energy is verified.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(1) - Energy control program",
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(2)(iii) - Lockout and tagout device use",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d) - Application of control"
  ]
}
